name: Stewed Partridges with Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
From "The Gastronomy of Spain and Portugal," by Maite Manjon.
1. Place the birds in a casserole with all remaining ingredients except the chocolate and potato slices. Insert the whole cloves into the head of garlic.
2. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes to an hour, shaking the casserole at intervals and adding a little more wine if necessary.
3. Remove the partridges and place on a heated serving platter. Add the chocolate to the contents of the casserole and cook for 5 minutes. Rub the sauce through a sieve with a wooden spoon or process in a blender or food processor.
4. Arrange the slices of fried potato around the birds, then pour on the sauce so that it completely covers the birds.
